scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:client & npm run dev:admin
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:client
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint && cd ../admin && npm run lint
